recommendation.title: 1065 / Partnership
recommendation.summary: Tina sees a multi-owner or partnership-style setup, so she should route this to the partnership path instead of the Schedule C pilot.
reasons: More than one owner usually means a partnership-style starting path unless a different election is proved.
